name: Date Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve baking soda in the boiling water.
2. Add the diced dates to the baking soda mixture.
3. Cream together butter and sugar.
4. Gradually add flour, beaten egg, salt, and remaining flour with nut meats.
5. Combine all ingredients until just mixed.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes at 375°F.
